case_title: OPORTUN, INC. VS. MOISES MUTUL COOT

docket_entries.description: ORDER RE: DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE BY PLAINTIFF. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT)

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, REPRESENTED BY LUPE ACEVEDO, LEGAL COLLECTION SPECIALIST IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT MOISES MUTUL COOT IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
